title: Cette nuit là...
writer: Maurice Cazeneuve, Paul Guimard, Michel Lebrun
actors: Mylène Demongeot, Maurice Ronet, Jean Servais
plot: Jean, who is the artistic director of a fashion magazine, is married to a very pretty cover girl, Sylvie. They both work for André Reverdy, a very cynical man, who openly covets Sylvie. Jean, awfully jealous, can't put up with the...
